project.name: BioSeek
project.tagline: Biomedical information retrieval and data mining for retrieval-method comparison.
project.research_question: How do different retrieval methods affect both the relevance and the diversity/structure of biomedical information retrieved from PubMed?

retrieval_methods.label: TF-IDF
retrieval_methods.description: Sparse lexical baseline using term weighting over titles and abstracts.

retrieval_methods.label: Hybrid Retrieval
retrieval_methods.description: Weighted fusion of lexical and dense retrieval scores.

frontend.default_query: What biomarkers are associated with early Alzheimer's disease?
